Eligibility and Enrolment
Last updated on July 30, 2024
If you arrived under CUAET, you can
get the cost of your immigration medical exam covered or reimbursed
.
Under the
Medicare Protection Act
, enrolment with MSP is mandatory for all eligible residents and their dependents.
Last updated:
October 3
, 20
22
On this page:
Eligibility
How to apply
Get an MSP account confirmation letter
I need help
Eligibility
A person must be a B.C. resident to qualify for medical coverage under Medical Services Plan (MSP).
Learn about who is eligible to enrol in MSP
How to apply
Using one form, the
BC Application for Health and Drug Coverage
allows you and your family to apply for:
Medical Services Plan (MSP)
Fair PharmaCare
Supplementary Benefits
In order to use health-care services in B.C., you must apply for MSP.
Find out how to apply and what medical coverage you need while you wait for your application to be processed
.
How to apply
Get an MSP account confirmation letter
If you have already enrolled, use this online form to request an MSP Account Confirmation letter that will verify MSP enrolment status for one or more individuals on your MSP account.
Request MSP Account Confirmation
I need help
If you have questions about eligibility, contact Health Insurance BC:
By phone
From the Lower Mainland,
1-604-683-7151
Elsewhere in B.C.,
1-800-663-7100
By mail
Health Insurance BC
PO Box 9035 St Prov Govt
Victoria, BC V8W 9E3
